'''Dagnian Sark''' was a fanatically loyal [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent sent to [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]] to identify [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spies. He posed as a regular recruit, hoping to one day catch a Rebel spy in the act and thus get a promotion. He was slender and agile, with an overly friendly attitude.
